description: Building and enhancing web and mobile applications using Next.js and React Native.
Developing end-to-end product features across frontend and backend systems.
Leading key development initiatives, including the mobile application effort, CI/CD implementation, and app store release management.
Implemented and maintained Time & Attendance (T&A) solutions using Workforce Software (WFS) and Workforce Manager (WFM) for global clients, including Hollister Netherlands and PBF Energy.
Utilized Java, JavaScript, and SQL for data audits, integrations, imports/exports, and workforce management configurations.
Collaborated with cross-functional teams to analyze business requirements, troubleshoot issues, and deliver customized workforce management solutions.
Improved operational efficiency by streamlining audit processes and automating routine data operations.

Developed multiple full-stack applications using React and .NET, including a Craps game, CRUD management system, e-commerce platform, Kanban board, AI-powered HR chatbot, and resume management application.
Implemented features such as role-based authentication, multi-tenancy, REST API integrations, and responsive user interfaces.
Contributed to production-level AI-enabled HR solutions while gaining hands-on experience with React, .NET Core, JavaScript, and Agile development practices.
Worked with Java, Apache POI, and MySQL to process and transform large smart meter datasets.
Developed Excel-to-CSV conversion workflows, implemented error handling and logging mechanisms, and optimized data processing performance.
